description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray, with large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically across the facade. The property features a driveway leading to a garage, a small front yard with three trees, and a fenced backyard with a wooden deck. The house includes a visible rooftop terrace and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, suggesting a contemporary open-plan interior. The landscaping is simple, with paved walkways and minimal decorative elements. A purple car is parked in the driveway, adding a pop of color to the otherwise neutral palette.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with large windows, a garage, a fenced backyard, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, three trees, and a purple car parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, wooden deck, and the open backyard area with fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, rooftop terrace, and large windows on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional trees, and the continuation of the wooden deck and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and no porch or decorative columns
